groups.label: Ancient Egypt
groups.explanation: Pyramids, pharaohs, the Nile River, and hieroglyphics are all hallmarks of ancient Egypt.

groups.label: Ancient Greece
groups.explanation: The Parthenon, democracy, the Olympics, and the Acropolis all trace back to ancient Greece.

groups.label: Ancient Rome
groups.explanation: The Colosseum, the Senate, aqueducts, and the legion were all part of ancient Rome.

groups.label: Ancient Mesopotamia
groups.explanation: Ziggurats, cuneiform writing, Hammurabi, and the Sumerians all belong to ancient Mesopotamia.
